DFIntUseFtsThumbEnrollHeaderHundredthPer.purpose: Enhances the accuracy of thumbnail performance metrics for developers.

DFFlagVideoWinHwEncoderFilterQuickSyncVe.mechanism: Enables support for specific hardware encoder versions in video processing.
DFFlagVideoWinHwEncoderFilterQuickSyncVe.purpose: Improves video quality and performance for players streaming or recording gameplay.

DFIntTriangleMeshPartMigrationTelemetryR.mechanism: Tracks the rollout of triangle mesh part migration across different user segments.
DFIntTriangleMeshPartMigrationTelemetryR.purpose: Ensures a smooth transition for players using triangle mesh parts in their games.

FFlagReimportBetaFeature_Staged.mechanism: Allows re-importing of assets in a staged environment for testing.
FFlagReimportBetaFeature_Staged.purpose: Enables developers to test changes to assets without affecting the live game.

FFlagEnableIAFlyoutIXPHomeProfileRemoval.mechanism: Removes the home profile flyout interface for improved navigation.
FFlagEnableIAFlyoutIXPHomeProfileRemoval.purpose: Simplifies the user interface for players, making it easier to access profiles.

DFIntVideoWinHwEncoderMinQuickSyncH264Pr.mechanism: Sets a minimum product version for hardware encoding in video playback.
DFIntVideoWinHwEncoderMinQuickSyncH264Pr.purpose: Ensures smoother video playback for users with compatible hardware.

FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.mechanism: Changes the position of menu buttons on mobile devices.
FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.purpose: Improves user experience by making buttons easier to reach and use on mobile.

DFFlagBtfUseAssetRequest.mechanism: Utilizes a new method for requesting assets from the server.
DFFlagBtfUseAssetRequest.purpose: Enhances performance and reduces loading times for players when accessing assets.

DFFlagDirectFieldSet_Staged.mechanism: Allows direct updates to specific fields in game objects without needing to reload them.
DFFlagDirectFieldSet_Staged.purpose: Improves game performance by making changes faster and smoother for players.

FFlagFmodLockFreeDspGetIdle_Staged.mechanism: Reduces delays in audio processing by allowing sound effects to be accessed without locking resources.
FFlagFmodLockFreeDspGetIdle_Staged.purpose: Enhances the audio experience in games, making sounds play more responsively and clearly.
